page_title: SH-06D NERV Complete Guide Enjoy Evangelion on your Smartphone
text:
is a guide mook for docomo SH-06D NERV smartphone written by MyNavi. It was published by MyNavi on 16 June 2012. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4839943540 

Overview

This guidebook is recommended for users who want to make the most of the "docomo SH-06D NERV", a collaboration model with the popular Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo series.
It provides detailed explanations of the home screen, widgets, apps, and other features unique to the "docomo SH-06D NERV" that are not available on conventional Android smartphones. Of course, it is also packed with basic smartphone know-how, such as how to input text, enjoy photos, music, and videos, and how to use email. It also introduces recommended Evangelion-related apps, making it a book we recommend not only to users who have purchased the "docomo SH-06D NERV," but also to any Evangelion fan with an Android smartphone.
